CustomField.formula:
IF( Onboarding_HealthScore_Week_4__c = "Poor", "Poor "&IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 12, 130 ),
IF( Onboarding_HealthScore_Week_4__c = "Average", "Average "&IMAGE("/img/samples/color_yellow.gif", "yellow", 12,130 ) ,
IF( Onboarding_HealthScore_Week_4__c = "Good", "Good "&IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", "green", 12,130 ),
"")))
CustomField.label: ONB HS Flag W4
